subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-04 in San Francisco
subcodes.first_line: Nature is worshipped by scientists because of the wonderful laws found there, but did you ever realize that Nature is very imperfect, is almost chaotic, until man inspired of the Spirit comes to direct her.
subcodes.subjects: @perfection; imperfection of nature, @power of the mind over nature, @need for an educator
